mapper.sql: uid, phone, real_name, id_card_type, id_card_no, auth_level, face_status, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO c_user ( phone, real_name, id_card_type, id_card_no, auth_level, face_status, create_time ) VALUES ( #{phone}, #{realName, typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{idCardType}, #{idCardNo, typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.Sm4EncryptTypeHandler}, #{authLevel, typeHandler=com.pangu.infrastructure.persistence.handler.AuthenticationLevelTypeHandler}, #{faceStatus}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT r.role_key FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id WHERE u.uid = #{uid} AND u.status = '0' AND r.status = '0'

SELECT u.user_id as userId, u.dept_id as deptId, d.dept_type as deptType, r.data_scope as dataScope FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE u.uid = #{uid} AND u.status = '0' LIMIT 1
